title: OpenClaw agent-config.yaml
description: Per-agent identity, capability, and channel-binding declaration. Consumed by the openclaw-gateway deploy action to generate agents.lock.toml.

handle.description: Discord @-mention used in chat. Must start with @.

contract_version.description: Inter-agent protocol version this agent obeys.

allowed_channels.description: Discord channels where this agent may receive direct @-mentions.

skills.description: Skill names this agent declares it can serve.

canary.description: If true, the gateway routes ~10% of traffic here.

canary_weight_percent.description: Percentage of traffic routed to this canary agent (default 10). Only effective when canary is true.

enforce_channel_pinning.description: If true, the gateway enforces channel pinning for this agent (routing fails when the message arrives from a channel not in allowed_channels). Only effective when dry_run is false. Default: false (dry-run is opt-in to enforcement).

dry_run.description: If true, channel pinning violations for this agent are logged but do not block routing. Default: true per RFC #31 Phase 5 (#48) — dry-run for one week before enforcement activates. Flip to false to activate enforcement (requires enforce_channel_pinning: true).
